context_pack.exact_source_excerpt: \begin{Lem} Let $(R_{i,j}; 1\leq i\leq N,1\leq j\leq J)$ denote independent Bernoulli trials with parameters $(P_{i,j}; 1\leq i\leq N, 1\leq j\leq J)$. Under a general latent class model, given an arbitrary latent attribute profiles $\mathbf{A}$, there is \begin{align*} &\inf_{\bm{\Theta}} \mathbb{E}[ \ell(\mathbf{A},\bm{\Theta}|\mathbf{R})] -\inf_{\bm{\Theta}} \ell(\mathbf{A},\bm{\Theta}|\mathbf{R}) \\ = & \sum_{j=1}^J \sum_{a=1}^{L_j} n_{j,a} (\widehat{\theta}_{j,a}- \overline{\theta}_{j,a})^2 + \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{j=1}^J (P_{i,j} - R_{i,j})(1-2\overline{\theta}_{j,z_i}) \\ = & \sum_{j=1}^J \sum_{a=1}^{L_j} n_{j,a} (\widehat{\theta}_{j,a}- \overline{\theta}_{j,a})^2 + \mathbb{E}[X] - X ,\tag{A.7} \end{align*} \noindent where $X = \sum_{j=1}^J\sum_{i=1}^N R_{i,j}(1- 2\overline{\theta}_{j,z_i})$ is a random variable depending on $\mathbf{A}$ and $L_j$ denotes the number of the distinct local latent classes induced by $\bm{q}_j$ for item $j$. \end{Lem}

context_pack.exact_source_excerpt: \begin{Lem}\label{Lem6} Let $(R_{i,j}; 1\leq i\leq N,1\leq j\leq J)$ denote independent Bernoulli trials with parameters $(P_{i,j}; 1\leq i\leq N, 1\leq j\leq J)$. Under a general latent class model, given an arbitrary $\mathbf{A}$, there is \begin{align*} &\inf_{\bm{\Theta}} \mathbb{E}[ \ell(\mathbf{A},\bm{\Theta}|\mathbf{R})] -\inf_{\bm{\Theta}} \ell(\mathbf{A},\bm{\Theta}|\mathbf{R}) \\ = & \sum_{j=1}^J \sum_{a=2}^{L_j-1} n_{j,a} (\widehat{\theta}_{j,a}- \overline{\theta}_{j,a})^2 + \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{j=1}^J (P_{i,j} - R_{i,j})(1-2\overline{\theta}_{j,z_i}) \\ = & \sum_{j=1}^J \sum_{a=2}^{L_j-1} n_{j,a} (\widehat{\theta}_{j,a}- \overline{\theta}_{j,a})^2 + \mathbb{E}[X] - X, \tag{B.2} \end{align*} \noindent where $X = \sum_{j=1}^J\sum_{i=1}^N R_{i,j}(1- 2\overline{\theta}_{j,z_i})$ is a random variable depending on $\mathbf{A}$ and $L_j$ denotes the number of local distinct latent classes induced by $\bm{q}_j$ for item $j$. \end{Lem}
